response.overview: Three films produced exclusively for the Alpen Film Festival form the heart of the 2026 “Passion” tour—featuring David Göttler finding meaning in his mountaineering pursuits; a married couple sharing adventures even after 60 years together; passionate foresters transforming mountain forests into protective forests; Ines Papert and Sarah Huenekin impressively defying age; and two South Tyrolean brothers experiencing the highs and lows of freeriding together.
response.title: Alpen Film Festival 2026
